A BUSINESS ENTITY'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINITFF THOMAS MASS TO SUBMIT TO A NEUROPSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION AND NEUROLOGICAL EXAMINATION: DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE MOTION FAILS TO PROVIDE THE DEMANDS FOR THE IME EXAMINATIONS. MOVING PARTY TO SERVE THEIR IME NOTICES NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 4, 2021. THE DEMANDS MUST COMPLY WITH CARPENTER V. SUPERIOR (2006) 141 CA4TH 249. ANY SPECIFIC OBJECTION TO THE IME NOTICE AND FURTHER OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION ARE TO BE FILED AND SERVED BY OCTOBER 13, 2021. REPLY TO BE FILED AND SERVED BY OCTOBER 22, 2021. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 29, 2021. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE GALLO, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Off Calendar Oct-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-07-2021 Text Ruling

Motion To Compel Plainitff Thomas Mass To Submit To A Neuropsychological Evaluation And Neurological Examination
Off Calendar Sep-24-2021 Continued To Oct-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ali Delforoush, Esq. (925.222.3400; adelforoush@wshblaw.com) of Wood, Smith, Henning & Berman LLP for Defendants, Uber.
No other appearances.

The matter is not contested nor argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS FITSUM MITHRETAB, and ECKO TRANSPORATION INC. A BUSINESS ENTITY's Motion To Compel Plainitff Thomas Mass To Submit To A Neuropsychological Evaluation And Neurological Examination:

Denied without prejudice. The motion fails to provide the Demands for the IME examinations. Moving party to serve their IME Notices no later than October 4, 2021. The Demands must comply with Carpenter v. Superior (2006) 141 CA4th 249. Any specific objection to the IME Notice and further opposition to the motion are to be filed and served by October 13, 2021. Reply to be filed and served by October 22, 2021. Matter continued to October 29, 2021.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
